data.title: PhenixFIN Corp (NASDAQ: PFX, PFXNZ) revealed fiscal year and fourth quarter 2025 financial results.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, PhenixFIN Corporation revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year and Q4 of 2025. The Company, listed on NASDAQ as PFX and PFXNZ, operates as a publicly traded business development firm.

data.title: Tim Van Damm sets new Rancho Santa Fe record with $28M sale – estate includes 19 bedrooms, 23 baths, 39 acres.
data.description: In San Diego, Rancho Santa Fe, known for its elite luxury residences, achieved a notable feat as it recently finalized its most expensive residential transaction to date. The prestigious locality witnessed the sale of a stunning estate at 5993 Calle Camposeco for a record-breaking price of $28,000,000. This exceptional property boasts an extensive 31,068 square feet living area, comprising 19 bedrooms, 23 bathrooms, and sprawling across 39 acres of meticulously kept grounds. The buyers for this historic purchase were represented by a yet undisclosed entity.

data.title: Byreal, a DEX on Solana, achieves $1 billion in trading volume in 10 weeks, redefining DeFi growth.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 12, 2025, Byreal, a decentralized exchange (DEX) developed by Bybit for the Solana ecosystem, has proven the success of real assets and liquidity on-chain. The hybrid DEX revealed that it has surpassed $1 billion in cumulative transaction volume.

data.title: Binance suggests stock perps with new API for re-entry into equities race after 2021 setback.
data.description: Binance recently introduced new API endpoints related to stock perpetual futures, indicating a focused effort to expand into stock trading following a previous unsuccessful attempt in 2021. This move reflects the company's commitment to entering the stock trading market.

data.title: Bunker Hill Mining acquires Ranger-Page Project in Idaho with 100% interest option; also gains 75% stake in Blackhawk Property.
data.description: On Dec. 12, 2025, Bunker Hill Mining Corp. (TSX-V:BNKR |OTCQB:BHLL) from Kellogg, Idaho, and Vancouver, British Columbia, announced the completion of its asset purchase with Silver Dollar Resources (Idaho) Inc. This deal includes acquiring up to a 100% interest in the Ranger-Page mineral sites, comprising six high-grade silver-lead-zinc mines next to the Bunker Hill Mine in Idaho, USA. Additionally, they secured a 75% interest in the Government Gulch property. The Acquired Properties consist of the Ranger-Page Project and the Blackhawk Property, part of the prolific Silver Valley mining district. This development follows a previous news release on October 27, 2025.

data.title: Katapult, The Aaron's Company, and CCF Holdings to merge in all-stock deal.
data.description: Katapult has officially agreed to join forces with The Aaron’s Company, Inc. and CCF Holdings LLC in a definitive agreement. This collaboration will be an all-stock transaction, consolidating the strengths of the three entities. The merging of these companies is set to create a robust partnership, leveraging their combined resources. The agreement marks a significant milestone in the industry, with a clear focus on growth and expansion. This strategic move is expected to bring about fruitful results for all involved, with the alliance poised to drive innovation and development.

data.title: Simplilearn names Sudipto Mitra as Chief Revenue Office to drive revenue growth, with over two decades of experience.
data.description: In Plano, Texas on December 12, 2025, Simplilearn, a prominent company specializing in digital upskilling, revealed the selection of Sudipto Mitra as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) for its commercial division. With more than twenty years of leadership background in digital, Mitra joins the team to enhance business operations.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Services will present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 14, 2026, at 9:00 am.
data.description: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a prominent player in injectable drug administration solutions, revealed its participation in the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference set for January 14, 2026, at 9:00 am. This announcement came from Exton, Pennsylvania, on December 12, 2025. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WST, showcasing its strong market presence.

data.title: Schneider Electric launches One Digital Grid Platform to aid utilities in modernizing, reduce energy costs. Launched at Enlit Europe with 15,000+ professionals.
data.description: Schneider Electric, a leading global energy technology company, has introduced its One Digital Grid Platform in Mississauga, Ontario. This innovative platform, powered by artificial intelligence, aims to assist utilities in accelerating modernization efforts, enhancing grid resilience, and cutting down energy expenses. The launch of this platform coincided with the Enlit Europe event held in Spain, with over 15,000 attendees from 130 nations. Additionally, the platform was rolled out at Schneider Electric’s Innovation Summit North America.

data.title: Key press releases: Paramount plans to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, TIME's Person of the Year announced, and Santa's house returns on Zillow.
data.description: In the bustling city of New York, on December 12, 2025, Paramount made a significant bid to purchase Warner Bros. Discovery, garnering attention in the media. Additionally, TIME revealed their Person of the Year amidst the buzz generated by various news releases. In a festive gesture, Santa's residence was reintroduced on Zillow, adding excitement for the upcoming holiday season. This influx of information on PR Newswire showcases the fast-paced nature of the news world, with numerous announcements vying for public attention every week.

data.title: Global monomaterial PE solution market to double to USD 5.7 billion by 2035 driven by recyclable packaging trend.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of December 11, 2025, the market for monomaterial PE solutions is projected to see substantial growth, increasing from a value of USD 3.0 billion in 2025 to a forecasted USD 5.7 billion by 2035. This growth is fueled by the increasing global shift towards recyclable packaging, monomaterial polyethylene constructions, and environmentally sustainable practices.

data.title: EPWK launching in Jan 2026, starts global supply chain recruitment plan. Amid consumption upgrade trend, looking for substance and emotional connections.
data.description: In Xiamen, China on December 12, 2025, the market is witnessing a rise in demand for products and shopping experiences that provide more value and deeper emotional ties, in line with the trends of consumption upgrade and aesthetic transformation. A notable player in this space is EPWK (Nasdaq: EPWK), a company traded on the Nasdaq stock exchange.
